title.en: The Haggadah's Four Sons: Which One Are You?
title.he: ארבעה בנים בהגדה: איזה מהם אתה?
title.zh: 哈格达的四子：你是哪一个？

description.en: A deep dive into the Wise, Wicked, Simple, and Silent children — what each represents and how to engage every type of learner.
description.he: עיון מעמיק בילדים החכם, הרשע, התם והשתקן - מה כל אחד מייצג וכיצד לעסוק עם כל סוג לומד.
description.zh: 深入探讨智慧、邪恶、单纯和沉默的孩子——每个代表什么以及如何与每种类型的学习者互动。

author: Torah Light Team

headerImage.description: A classical Chinese-style illustration showing four young scholars around a traditional study table, each representing different learning approaches - one engaged and questioning, one turning away dismissively, one listening simply, and one sitting silently. The scene is set against the backdrop of a traditional Chinese courtyard with lanterns, symbolizing the Four Sons across cultures and dynasties.

educationalObjectives: Building bridges across cultural wisdom traditions
